action.reasoning: Observation: empty workspace. Analysis: need satisfy first-iteration rule with a quick end-to-end baseline and eval. Decision: implement a robust Qlib Alpha158 + LightGBM pipeline, train a small baseline model, locally smoke-test predict.py on validation-like dates, and submit evaluation.
action.command: python train.py --num_boost_round 80 --out checkpoints/baseline && mkdir -p local_eval && echo '{"test_period":["2021-01-01","2021-12-31"],"universe":"csi300","feature_set":"Alpha158"}' > local_eval/eval_config.json && python predict.py --data_path local_eval --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output local_eval/out.json
